message:
fix: include tool_result_message in error-path act_end events

The two error paths in executeDelegation (unknown agent, subagent crash)
emitted act_end events without tool_result_message, causing resume to
miss tool results for failed delegations. Now both paths construct the
message before emitting and include it in the event data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
